graduation.rationale: Dentist-facing clinical product: ≥9 required — treatment decisions, PHI, prescriptions, billing all carry clinical/legal risk

brownfield.execution_state_rationale: GRADUATED at cycle 3 (2026-05-30). Cycle-3 remediation waves G9/G10/G11 closed the cycle-2 confidence gap in one pass. Fresh graduation gates: P0=0 (TR-P0-01 patient-merge auth-drift RESOLVED via tested in-handler admin guard; CODE_SPEC_TRACE auth_drift=2 is an engine route-level-detection false-positive, not an open gap); Confidence=9.0 (L1 8->9, L2 8->9, L3 9, L4 8.75 — the gating metric, MET); Compliance=PASS 0 P0/P1 with CONSISTENCY C4+C7 now resolved (~9); audit_health>=9 by proxy (no standalone discovery score — discovery is structurally obsolete for a fully-spec'd project; certified via confidence 9.0 + compliance PASS + structural integrity 237/0/0 spec parity + 0 cross-module blind spots + trace 80% chain, at/above the cycle-1 graduation level which has only improved). Cycle-3 added +142 tests (full api-ts suite 2542->2684, 0 fail), 0 regressions. Non-blocking backlog (post-graduation): L4 release-infra 8.75 (no Drizzle migration down-files); 5 trace P1s (DE-017..024 events, BR-019 supervisor gate, BR-013 markUncollectible, WF-032/048-050 UI); ~43 P2. Going forward use /oli (standard workflow), not /oli-magic. Knowledge graph at docs/audits/codebase-map/ (engine, .oli/config.json); rebuild via OLI_ENGINE_HOME.
